message:
fix: address multiple bug fixes across gateway, web UI, and agent drivers

Several targeted fixes identified during code audit:

- Fix forecast scenarios endpoint ignoring forecastId URL parameter by adding
  getForecastById() lookup instead of always fetching latest forecast
  (cost-analytics.ts, cost-forecast.service.ts)
- Validate dashboard visibility query parameter against known values before
  type-casting to prevent invalid values reaching the DB layer (dashboards.ts)
- Add prototype pollution guard to substituteVariables() by checking against
  UNSAFE_CONTEXT_KEYS before property traversal (pipeline.service.ts)
- Add .catch() to fire-and-forget handleAgentEvents() call to prevent
  unhandled promise rejections crashing the process (agent.ts)
- Fix off-by-one in output buffer trimming: use > instead of >= so the buffer
  can actually reach its configured size before evicting (base-driver.ts)
- Improve accessibility: add htmlFor/id pairs on form labels, keyboard event
  handlers on interactive divs, ARIA roles/attributes on modal overlay, and
  replace array-index React keys with stable composite keys (DCG.tsx,
  Dashboards.tsx, Utilities.tsx)
- Extract shared mapForecastRow() helper to DRY forecast row mapping
- Sync beads issue tracker with new bug tickets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
